### 🔁 Rollback / Revert PR

**Reason for Rollback**
Explain why this change is being reverted (e.g., bug introduced, performance regression, etc.).

**Original PR**
Link to the original PR being reverted:
> Reverts #[PR number]

**Verification Steps**
How was this rollback tested?
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] App behavior validated

**Next Steps**
- [ ] Notify affected users/stakeholders
- [ ] Open follow-up PR (if necessary)
